Summary: International funds are reopening briefly. The $7 billion ceiling that shut the door in 2022 hasn't moved. But the breathing room inside it has. Here's where it is, right now.
For decades, geography was a constraint Indian investors simply lived with. Capital stayed at home, whether it wanted to or not.

results.title: Best Performing Mutual Funds To Invest in India (2026)
excerpts:
Section Title: Best Mutual Funds > ... > What are the best mutual funds to invest in for 2026?
Content:
The best funds for you depend on your financial goals , risk appetite, and investment horizon. For long-term wealth creation, consider large-cap equity funds, flexi-cap funds, or index funds. If you’re seeking stability, debt funds or balanced hybrid funds are excellent options. At Value Research , we curate and rate funds based on performance, consistency, and risk to help you make the best choice.

Section Title: **Global Index Fund** > ... > **Research the Index**
Content:
Not all Global Index Funds are the same. They may track different indices, focusing on various regions or sectors. Before investing, research the specific index the fund is tracking to ensure it aligns with your investment goals and risk tolerance. This will help you better understand the potential growth and risks associated with the fund.

excerpts:
Section Title: Top International Funds in India
Content:
The Indian mutual fund industry crossed ₹81 lakh cr in AUM as of January 2026, with overseas Fund of Funds registering a 35% jump in the past year. International mutual funds offer Indian investors a SEBI-regulated route to access equity markets across the US, Europe, Asia, and beyond.

 ... 
Section Title: ... > [Aditya Birla SL Intl. Equity Fund](https://www.tickertape.in/mutualfunds/aditya-birla-sl-i...
Content:
This fund invests in a diversified mix of international companies across regions such as the US, Europe, and Asia. It aims to offer long‑term capital growth by focusing on quality global equities.
 ... 
Section Title: Top International Funds in India > ... > Access to Global Giants > Rupee Depreciation Favour
Content:
The Indian Rupee has historically weakened against the US Dollar over time. When the Rupee depreciates, the value of your international investment rises when converted back to Rupees, giving your returns an added boost without any extra effort on your part.
 ... 
Section Title: Top International Funds in India > ... > Risk Appetite > Fund Structure: Direct vs FoF
Content:
You need to understand whether the fund invests directly in foreign securities or through the FoF route, because this affects your costs, tax treatment, and the level of control the Indian fund manager exercises over the portfolio's composition.
 ... 
Section Title: Top International Funds in India > Frequently Asked Questions About International Funds
Content:
What is an international fund?International mutual funds are mutual fund scheme that invests in stocks, bonds, or securities of companies listed outside India. Investors contribute in Rupees, and the fund manager deploys capital into foreign markets such as the US, Europe, Japan, or Taiwan. SEBI mandates that at least 80% of the corpus be allocated to foreign equity instruments. These funds either invest directly in overseas stocks or use a Fund of Funds structure, investing in an existing foreign mutual fund. Which international fund is best?As of 18th February 2026, some of the top International mutual funds in India based on 1-year returns include:**Disclaimer** : Please note that the technology funds list is for educational purposes only, and is not recommendatory.
